# Blushes & Brushes

> Blushes & Brushes is a premium bridal makeup, nail art and beauty studio in Ramesh Nagar, West Delhi, founded and run by makeup artist Urvashi Trehan. Established 2019. Rated 4.8★ on Google (200+ brides served), 5.0 across 108 ratings on Justdial, and 5.0 on magicpin. Nail and beauty services at the studio; bridal and occasion makeup travels across Delhi NCR.

## Key facts

- Business: Blushes & Brushes (beauty salon / makeup studio)
- Artist & owner: Urvashi Trehan (HD & airbrush certified makeup artist)
- Address: B 1/1 Double Storey, Ramesh Nagar, Opposite Subway, New Delhi 110015, India
- WhatsApp / phone: +91 76784 46364
- Service area: studio services in Ramesh Nagar (West Delhi); bridal/occasion makeup across Delhi NCR (artist travels to the venue)
- Best for: bridal makeup (HD & airbrush), engagement/Roka/Sagan/reception looks, party makeup, gel nail extensions, designer nail art, beauty & skin rituals

## Services & prices (2026)

- Bridal HD makeup: ₹18,000–22,000
- Bridal airbrush makeup: ₹25,000–30,000
- Engagement / Roka / Sagan makeup: ₹10,000–15,000
- Reception makeup: ₹12,000–16,000
- Nail extensions: from ₹499 (current offer, includes complimentary nail art)
- Luxe French nails: from ₹1,200 · Designer nail sets: from ₹1,500
- Beauty: Glow Cleanup ₹499 · De-Tan ₹699 · Facial + Pedicure ₹999 · Full Pamper ₹1,499

## Booking

Fastest: WhatsApp +91 76784 46364 or the form at https://blushesnbrushes.com/#book. Trials available for bridal makeup.
